sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Row 42:", ascii_lines[42])
print("Row 44:", ascii_lines[44])

# Check all control positions
for r, label in [(42, "top"), (45, "bottom")]:
    row = ascii_lines[r]
    print(f"\n{label} row ({r}):")
    for col in [21, 26, 31, 36, 41]:
        print(f"  col {col}: '{row[col]}'")

# Also check if anything else changed - look at yellow shapes
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nYellow objects:")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'Y':
        print(f"  id={node['id']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, boundary={node['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
